title: Are QS' Expanding OEM Partnerships Gaining Real Traction?
text: QuantumScape has announced multiple partnerships and joint development agreements with major global automakers throughout 2025, expanding beyond its initial Volkswagen Group focus. The company achieved agreements with four of the top 10 global automotive OEMs, indicating broader industry validation of its solid-state battery technology. Each partnership appears at a different stage of maturity, from early technology evaluations to active joint development agreements. PowerCo's commitment of up to $131 million for the joint scale-up facility demonstrates confidence in the technology's viability for commercial production. The Ducati motorcycle demonstration at IAA Mobility in September 2025 provided proof-of-concept for real-world battery performance in an electric vehicle application. Customer billings grew from zero in prior years to $19.5 million in 2025, indicating that OEM partners are willing to commit financial resources to support development and production scaling. Management expects customer billings to increase further in 2026 as additional agreements move toward commercialization phases.
